  "findings": [
    "Fixture rating and listing labels are not visible on the staged packaging or components to verify compliance with the approved submittals and drawings."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Unpack or rotate the staged fixtures to expose the manufacturer rating labels, listing marks, and model numbers for inspection before installation begins."
  ],
  "rationale": "The fixtures are staged but their ratings and listings cannot be verified from the current orientation of the packaging. Per NEC 410, luminaires must be listed and marked with their ratings. Verification is required before installation to prevent installing non-compliant or incorrectly rated equipment.",

    "NEC 410.6",
    "NEC 410.8"
  ]
